## Summary

Describe the change in terms of user-visible behavior or contract impact.

## Validation

List the narrowest commands that demonstrate the change.

## Public Surface Impact

Describe any public API, metadata, reporter, or platform changes.

## Follow-up Risk

Call out any remaining risk, unsupported edge case, or intentional follow-up.

See [the pull request template guide](../docs/src/pull-request-template.md) for
the canonical review checklist and release-alignment guidance.
